final:
module divider_2bit (
    input [1:0] dividend_value,
    input [1:0] divisor,
    output reg [1:0] quotient,
    output reg [1:0] remainder
);
    
    always @(*) begin
        if (divisor == 2'b00) begin
            quotient = 2'b00; // Handle division by zero
            remainder = dividend_value; // Remainder is the dividend_value
        end else begin
            quotient = dividend_value / divisor;
            remainder = dividend_value % divisor;
        end
    end
endmodule
